description_long: This object appears to be an abstract, highly stylized representation of a human figure, possibly intended as a modern art sculpture or a conceptual pedestrian form. The structure is slender and elongated, with a central vertical element that tapers upward and branches into two wide, angular extensions resembling outstretched arms or wings. The surface is smooth and reflective, with a metallic sheen that suggests a polished metal material. The form lacks detailed anatomical features such as a head, hands, or feet, emphasizing geometric abstraction over realism. The overall silhouette is dynamic and striking, evoking a sense of motion or balance.
description: A slender, abstract human figure with elongated limbs and a smooth, metallic surface, resembling a modern art sculpture.
description_view_0: The central vertical element is prominent, with two wide, angular extensions spreading outward, creating a V-shaped silhouette.
description_view_1: One angular extension dominates the view, with the rest of the form receding, emphasizing the thinness and sharpness of the structure.
description_view_2: The vertical element and both angular extensions are visible, highlighting the symmetry and geometric abstraction of the form.
description_view_3: The opposite angular extension is most visible, with the rest of the structure appearing narrow and sharp.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract sculptural form, no discernible clothing
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
